items.title: A Mathematical Theory of Communication (Shannon, 1948)
items.author: Claude E. Shannon
items.note: Original definition of H = −Σ p log p, source coding theorem, and foundation of information theory.

items.title: Elements of Information Theory (Cover & Thomas)
items.author: Thomas M. Cover, Joy A. Thomas
items.note: Standard textbook treatment of Shannon entropy, joint entropy, conditioning, and connections to compression.

items.title: scikit-learn metrics.entropy
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Practical Shannon entropy from count or probability vectors with configurable log base.
